description:
Kangaroo is a SQL client and admin tool.

Kangaroo is a AI-powered SQL client and admin tool for popular databases(MariaDB / MySQL / Oracle / PostgreSQL / SQLite / SQLServer / ...) on Windows / MacOS / Linux, support table design, query, model, sync, export/import etc, focus on comfortable, fun and developer friendly.
New features & bug-fixes
- Redis: database support
- Redis: key support
- Redis: client support
- Redis: cluster support
- Redis: pubsub support
- Redis: user support
- Redis: shard support
- Redis: module/function/command support
- Redis: console support
- Redis: query support
- Refactor error message style
- Make titlebar background modification free
- Workspace: grid add row and selection support
- Update Chinese translation(zh-CN/zh-SG/zh-Hans/zh-Hant)
- MySQL: fixed database/schema load issue
- Fixed: Fixed app workspace action issue
- Fixed: explorer's common menu issue
